allow: PowerShell(.\\lr0.exe; Write-Output "===EXITCODE: $LASTEXITCODE==="; Get-Item .\\lr0.exe | Select-Object Length, LastWriteTime)

PowerShell(g++ -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -O2 lr0.cpp -o lr0.exe; Write-Output "===COMPILE EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE==="; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { .\\lr0.exe | Select-Object -First 15; Write-Output "===RUN EXIT: $LASTEXITCODE===" })

PowerShell(Write-Host "g++ path:" \(Get-Command g++ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Host "lr0.exe locked?"; if \(Test-Path .\\lr0.exe\) { try { [IO.File]::OpenWrite\("$PWD\\lr0.exe"\).Close\(\); Write-Host "  no \(can write\)" } catch { Write-Host "  YES: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } else { Write-Host "  not present" })
PowerShell(Remove-Item .\\lr0.exe -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & g++ -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -O2 -Wall lr0.cpp -o lr0.exe; Write-Host "---EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE---")

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== which g++ ==="; \(Get-Command g++ -All | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source\); Write-Host "=== g++ --version ==="; & g++ --version; Write-Host "=== EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE ===")

PowerShell(Remove-Item .\\out_test.exe -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item .\\gcc.log -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; cmd /c "g++ -v -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -O2 -Wall lr0.cpp -o out_test.exe > gcc.log 2>&1"; Write-Host "=== cmd EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE ==="; Write-Host "=== out_test.exe exists?  $\(Test-Path .\\out_test.exe\) ==="; Write-Host "=== last 40 lines of gcc.log ==="; if \(Test-Path .\\gcc.log\) { Get-Content .\\gcc.log -Tail 40 } else { Write-Host "\(no log file produced — even stderr was lost\)" })
